name: Gas Huffer
label: Amphetamine Reptile Records

discography.title: The Inhuman Ordeal of Special Agent Gas Huffer
discography.label: Birdman

connections.description: Red-tailed Hawk (E=6). Both are sources of borrowed energy: Red-tail scream used for all raptors in cinema; punk energy borrowed/processed into commercial grunge.
Hovercraft (E=5). Largest energy jump in sequence (E=5 to E=7). Wordless precision to chaotic punk. Capitol Hill to Fremont.
Love Battery -- first U-District band. Gas Huffer = first Fremont band. Geography as identity in both cases.
Temple of the Dog opened raptor arc (225) with grief at E=7. Gas Huffer closes it (228) with humor at E=7. Same energy, opposite emotional register.

milestones: LARGEST ENERGY JUMP IN CURRENT SEQUENCE (E5-E7)
